text.title: Vision Agentic Pipeline — Production Architecture Failure Modes

antipattern.symptom: Single prompt tries to route + extract + validate at once.
antipattern.root-cause: Author optimised for prompt count instead of correctness.
antipattern.fix: Refactor into three subagents; each with its own prompt + model.

antipattern.symptom: Extractor output flows directly to production.
antipattern.root-cause: Team treats VLM output as ground truth.
antipattern.fix: Add a validator that applies deterministic business rules; veto on failure.

antipattern.symptom: Every step uses opus regardless of complexity.
antipattern.root-cause: Default model selection without per-task analysis.
antipattern.fix: Use haiku for router + validator; reserve sonnet/opus for the extractor.
